blocks.content: Lunar Surface.
Looking at the giant burning light on the ground, Shura had a sad expression.

blocks.speaker: Shura
blocks.content: Buddha…

blocks.speaker: Shura
blocks.content: The time spent by his side to learn the secrets of the world was never in vain.

blocks.speaker: Shura
blocks.content: You're really leaving.
Whether it was Nane or Anke, the shockwave that burst outside the ceiling would shake this world.

blocks.speaker: Shura
blocks.content: Just wait. But why…

blocks.speaker: Shura
blocks.content: Why does my heart feel so empty?

blocks.speaker: Shura
blocks.content: Buddha.
Shura murmured with a sorrowful expression.

blocks.speaker: Shura
blocks.content: Have a pleasant journey.
It was neither time nor space.
Nane was just waiting for a new finite world, passing through the distant void.

blocks.speaker: Nane
blocks.content: The secrets of the world.

blocks.speaker: Nane
blocks.content: Where did we come from, and where are we going?

blocks.speaker: Nane
blocks.content: It's different from death.
What Nane was attempting now was to transcend even the cycle of life and death and leave the world.
There was no long tunnel or white space that many experienced just before death.
Beyond the primordial boundary.
Just…
An undefinable space.
Nane's body began to slowly float above the calm surface like a black lake.
In the feeling of being submerged, there was no mass, and even without light, there was no difficulty in seeing.
At that moment, Nane realized his existence and focused his consciousness on what constituted him.

blocks.speaker: Nane
blocks.content: Going…

blocks.speaker: Nane
blocks.content: His voice leaked out.

blocks.speaker: Nane
blocks.content: Gaein gyese gakkba? (*Author's note: In reality, a reversal of thought occurs, but for convenience, it is replaced with a reversal of letters.)
The first thought was that there was nothing particularly different from before leaving the photon system.
Nane, who was lying on the surface, stood upright and gently stepped forward.
As the will to stand was imbued, the surface supported his body firmly as if it were solid.

blocks.speaker: Nane
blocks.content: Manjimitjae jom geoni.
While moving, Nane realized that the height of his field of vision was different from before and turned his head.
In the curtain of darkness where there was not even light, something presumed to be himself was shimmering.
A grasshopper's face.
The back was greatly curved, and the thin arms and legs had hook-like nails.

blocks.speaker: Nane
blocks.content: Nge gyese gakkba…

blocks.speaker: Nane
blocks.content: It was probably possible because it was Nane.

blocks.speaker: Nane
blocks.content: The moment he heard the sound from his neck with his ears, he realized everything.

blocks.speaker: Nane
blocks.content: Aaaaaaki!
The grasshopper human engraved in the curtain of darkness opened its grotesque jaws and screamed.
Under World.
The president of the Fire Management Company, Lete, led six generals to Marguerite's castle.
Behind them, numerous demons, trembling with betrayal, were shouting.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: Punish the traitor Marguerite!

blocks.speaker: General
blocks.content: Disgrace of the demons! A worm who sold his body to Yahweh! I must cut off his breath myself!
As all kinds of accusations poured in, the generals' bodies each exuded a murderous aura.

blocks.speaker: General
blocks.content: What is there to say.

blocks.speaker: General
blocks.content: But they couldn't dare to claim they were right in front of Lete.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: Guide us.
None of the generals moved, and Baeksa bit his lip awkwardly.

blocks.speaker: Baeksa
blocks.content: Open the door? I'd rather die.
It was absolutely unacceptable to pave the way for Lete, who intended to annihilate Marguerite.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: If you're still mistaken.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: You have no choice but to die mistaken.
Just as the generals were prepared for annihilation and closed their eyes.
Execution Captain Itaka stepped forward.

blocks.speaker: Itaka
blocks.content: I will open it.
Her black hair, like a shadow, dragged on the ground and spread around like ink.

blocks.speaker: Itaka
blocks.content: Itaka.

blocks.speaker: Itaka
blocks.content: I have no choice. The Grand Duke has sinned. Our loyalty is only useful when it helps in hell.

blocks.speaker: Moo
blocks.content: Damn it. Always showing off until the end.

blocks.speaker: Itaka
blocks.content: I will follow your will.
Her hair spread rapidly like a torrent and climbed the castle gate.
Kukukukuku!
With a grand sound, the scenery inside was revealed, and the demons raised their fists.

blocks.speaker: Demon
blocks.content: Drag out the Grand Duke! The Grand Duke…!
At that moment, a voice echoed from the sky.

blocks.speaker: Voice
blocks.content: The Grand Duke is not at fault.
The demons simultaneously looked up at the sky, but nothing particularly caught their eyes.

blocks.speaker: Voice
blocks.content: He cherishes hell more than anyone. That's why he accepted my proposal.
Following the forcibly opened path, Shirone was walking.

blocks.speaker: Oris
blocks.content: Yupi??????
No, now it's Yahweh.
But the large eyes of the cat still held the remnants of a young demon.
Meanwhile, unaware of the outside situation, Rian held the great sword connected to the chains of Gehenna.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: A sword that cuts the chains of karma. Does this mean I can release Jin Seong Eum with this?

blocks.speaker: Grand Duke
blocks.content: It depends on how much karma you can bear. Of course, I hope so too…
The Grand Duke stopped talking.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: If Jin Seong Eum is released and the spiritual realm is opened, there will be a second invasion of the demons.
Rian turned around.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: I see. Anyway, thank you.
It was something that could have been let go, but in the end, Marguerite asked.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: What about killing me?
Rian turned around.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: It's embarrassing to say, but I know many techniques that can conquer the human world.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: In other words, if the spiritual realm is opened, the most dangerous enemy is me.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: You could kill me now.
Rian examined the chains of Gehenna connected to through his palm.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: I do not judge.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Of course, he knew how pathetic and difficult it was.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: You helped Shirone. At least for now. If you hinder Shirone in the future, I will cut you down then.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: Do you think there will be a second chance?

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Marguerite felt heavy-hearted.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: A chance to eliminate the best brain in hell. If you try to cut me later, you will have to break through millions of soldiers first.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: …I will still cut you.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: What if you can't cut me? If you end up unable to cut me and your lord dies?

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: I can cut you.
There was no other choice, only the gaze to cut.
Perhaps at this moment, the mistake was not Rian's or Shirone's, but Marguerite's own.
Whether it's reality or hell, any philosophy, just cut it. Is it really right to just let this guy go?

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: See you on the battlefield.
Through the huge hole in the basement, Rian escaped outside the castle.
The silence created by Yahweh's appearance was shattered by the demons' anger.
Kraaaaa! Yahweh! Yahweh!
The eyes of the demons, looking at the detestable enemy, were bloodshot to the point of bursting.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: Yahweh.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: Your shamelessness pierces the sky. You acted as if you hated the demons so much, and now you reveal your disgusting face to us.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Leave Marguerite out of this.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He didn't betray the demons. Rather, he made a deal with me for the sake of hell.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The results will tell who was more advantageous, but both he and I did our best.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: Kekekeke! Kekekeke!
Lete burst into a laugh of anger.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: It's always like that. Look now. You talk as if you care for the demons.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: But in the end, you will annihilate us. Isn't that why you came here?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Why is that?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Answer me. If you're so confident, why did you disguise yourself as a demon and humiliate our children?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Do demons look so ridiculous to you, you bastard!
Regarding that…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The time spent as Yupi was short, but the interaction with the demons was sincere.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I apologize. I didn't look down on you. If I make an excuse, it was to prevent a bigger fight.

blocks.speaker: Oris
blocks.content: Do you call that an excuse!
The person who shouted as if tearing was not Lete but the stealth captain Oris.

blocks.speaker: Oris
blocks.content: How dare you…!
As if words couldn't relieve her anger, Oris kicked the cat's paw and rushed at Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Oris
blocks.content: 'You bastard!' How should she erase this betrayal of feeling a momentary affection for the most hated being?

blocks.speaker: Oris
blocks.content: 'I'll kill you!' Oris's sharp claws rushed at Shirone's neck as if to tear it apart.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Damn it!
The moment she saw Shirone's eyes without the will to counterattack, her hand stopped abruptly.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Why don't you avoid it? Do you think someone like me is easy?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I'm sorry. I deceived you. I didn't mean to hurt you, but it's my fault.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The cat's eyes burned.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Liar. You knew I couldn't kill you! That's the essence of Yahweh!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone confessed honestly.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I wanted to leave it to your judgment. But… I also knew.

blocks.speaker: Oris
blocks.content: Yes. That's exactly you. Pretending to love without prejudice, but in the end, doing everything your way.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: So, what should we do?
Shirone had a sad expression.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I can't die for you, nor can I kill you. I can't save everyone, nor can I keep everyone alive.
No one knows.
Even the Buddha, who was the only one to understand Yahweh, is no longer in this world.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: All deaths are lonely deaths.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'Should I really stop?' If it's okay to give up or fight, there's no need to suffer.

blocks.speaker: Oris
blocks.content: …How can I believe you?
Oris's murderous intent weakened.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: You don't need to believe me.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Believing in someone means believing in your own heart. Do what you want to do.
At that moment, Lete shouted.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: Kill him! Tear Yahweh, who insults the demons with his silver tongue, to pieces!
At the sound of the demons rushing in with screams, Oris's hand trembled.

blocks.speaker: Oris
blocks.content: 'It's a lie. This look in his eyes, the words he said, it's all a lie to get out of this situation.'
In the time flowing as slowly as the speed of thought, the demons' weapons came down.

blocks.speaker: Oris
blocks.content: 'I can't be fooled again. He will surely change his stance before dying. He will kill me. Before that, I must…'
Without a chance to escape, the weapons of the underworld soldiers pressed against Shirone's back.
Huuu…
With a bang, the floor was struck, and the demons looked around.

blocks.speaker: Demon
blocks.content: What? Where did he go?
Lete turned her head with a cold gaze.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: Oris.
Twenty meters away, Oris was holding Shirone in her arms, breathing heavily.
